mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(kpi.total_orders, 0) as "totalOrders", COALESCE(kpi.total_orders, 0) - COALESCE(kpi.cancellation_count, 0) as "activeOrders", COALESCE(kpi.total_revenue, 0) as "totalRevenue", COALESCE(kpi.active_buyers, 0) as "totalCustomers", COALESCE(kpi.total_products_listed, 0) as "publishedProducts", 0 as "pendingReviewProducts", COALESCE(kpi.active_sellers, 0) as "activeSuppliers", COALESCE(kpi.open_support_tickets, 0) as "openTickets" FROM hm_query.platform_kpi_snapshots kpi WHERE kpi.tenant = 'homebase' AND kpi.snapshot_date >= CAST(#{dateFrom} AS DATE) AND kpi.snapshot_date <= CAST(#{dateTo} AS DATE) ORDER BY kpi.snapshot_date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT order_status as "state", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE order_status IS NOT NULL AND order_date >= CAST(#{startDate} AS TIMESTAMP) AND order_date <= CAST(#{endDate} AS TIMESTAMP) GROUP BY order_status ORDER BY "count" DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT order_date::DATE) FROM hm_query.order_details_flat
AND order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'PAYMENT_FAILED') AND order_date::DATE >= CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AND order_date::DATE <= CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE) AND (order_number ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR customer_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.inventory_health_flat WHERE stock_status = 'LOW_STOCK' AND (sku ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))

SELECT inv.variant_id as "variantId", inv.sku as "sku", inv.product_id as "productId", inv.product_name as "productName", inv.available_qty as "availableQuantity", inv.low_stock_threshold as "threshold", inv.reserved_qty as "reservedQuantity" FROM hm_query.inventory_health_flat inv WHERE inv.stock_status = 'LOW_STOCK' AND (inv.sku ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR inv.product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.product_catalog_flat WHERE stock_status = 'OUT_OF_STOCK' AND product_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND (product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR primary_sku ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))

SELECT p.product_id as "productId", p.product_name as "productName", p.primary_sku as "variantId", p.primary_sku as "sku" FROM hm_query.product_catalog_flat p WHERE p.stock_status = 'OUT_OF_STOCK' AND p.product_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND (p.product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR p.primary_sku ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat WHERE seller_status = 'ACTIVE' AND (business_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR seller_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))

SELECT s.seller_id as "supplierId", s.business_name as "businessName", s.seller_status as "supplierState", s.total_products as "activeOffers", s.total_orders_30d as "totalOrders", s.gmv_30d as "totalRevenue" FROM hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat s WHERE s.seller_status = 'ACTIVE' AND (s.business_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR s.seller_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT return_status as "state", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE return_status IS NOT NULL GROUP BY return_status ORDER BY "count" DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.support_ticket_flat WHERE ticket_status NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'RESOLVED') AND (subject ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR ticket_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))

SELECT t.ticket_id as "ticketId", t.ticket_status as "ticketState", t.subject as "subject", t.priority as "priority", t.customer_id as "customerId", t.order_id as "orderId", t.created_time as "createdTime", t.assigned_agent_id as "assignedTo" FROM hm_query.support_ticket_flat t WHERE t.ticket_status NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'RESOLVED') AND (t.subject ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR t.ticket_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total_revenue) FROM hm_query.platform_kpi_snapshots WHERE tenant = 'homebase'), 0) as "totalRevenue", COALESCE((SELECT total_revenue FROM hm_query.platform_kpi_snapshots WHERE tenant = 'homebase' AND snapshot_date = CURRENT_DATE), 0) as "todayRevenue", COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.settlement_flat WHERE settlement_status = 'DISBURSED'), 0) as "disbursedSettlements", COALESCE((SELECT SUM(net_payout) FROM hm_query.settlement_flat WHERE settlement_status = 'DISBURSED'), 0) as "totalPayouts", COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.settlement_flat WHERE settlement_status = 'PENDING'), 0) as "pendingSettlements", COALESCE((SELECT SUM(net_payout) FROM hm_query.settlement_flat WHERE settlement_status = 'PENDING'), 0) as "pendingPayoutAmount", COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.settlement_flat WHERE settlement_status = 'DISPUTED'), 0) as "disputedSettlements", COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total_refund_amount) FROM hm_query.platform_kpi_snapshots WHERE tenant = 'homebase'), 0) as "totalRefunds", COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total_refund_amount) FROM hm_query.platform_kpi_snapshots WHERE tenant = 'homebase'), 0) as "totalRefundAmount"

SELECT kpi.snapshot_date as "date", COALESCE(kpi.total_revenue, 0) as "revenue", COALESCE(kpi.total_orders, 0) as "orderCount" FROM hm_query.platform_kpi_snapshots kpi WHERE kpi.tenant = 'homebase' AND kpi.snapshot_date >= CURRENT_DATE - COALESCE(#{days}, 30) ORDER BY kpi.snapshot_date ASC
SELECT settlement_status as "state", COUNT(*) as "count", COALESCE(SUM(net_payout), 0) as "totalAmount" FROM hm_query.settlement_flat GROUP BY settlement_status ORDER BY "count" DESC

SELECT COALESCE(s.total_products, 0) as "activeProducts", COALESCE(s.total_orders_30d, 0) as "totalOrders", COALESCE(s.gmv_30d, 0) as "totalRevenue", COALESCE(s.rating, 0) as "averageRating", 0 as "productsChange", 0 as "ordersChange", 0 as "revenueChange" FROM hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat s WHERE 1=1 AND s.seller_id = #{supplierId} LIMIT 1

SELECT o.order_date::DATE as "date", COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) as "orderCount", COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) as "revenue" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat o WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'PAYMENT_FAILED') AND o.seller_id = #{supplierId} AND o.order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - COALESCE(#{days}, 30) GROUP BY o.order_date::DATE ORDER BY "date" ASC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT oi.product_id) FROM hm_query.order_items_flat oi JOIN hm_query.order_details_flat o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'PAYMENT_FAILED') AND o.seller_id = #{supplierId} AND (oi.product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR oi.sku ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))

SELECT oi.product_id as "productId", oi.product_name as "productName", COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) as "orderCount", SUM(oi.quantity) as "unitsSold", COALESCE(SUM(oi.total_price), 0) as "revenue" FROM hm_query.order_items_flat oi JOIN hm_query.order_details_flat o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'PAYMENT_FAILED') AND o.seller_id = #{supplierId} AND (oi.product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR oi.sku ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) GROUP BY oi.product_id, oi.product_name ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.order_details_flat o WHERE 1=1 AND o.seller_id = #{supplierId} AND (o.order_number ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR o.order_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))

SELECT o.order_id as "orderId", o.order_status as "orderState", o.total_amount as "totalAmount", o.currency as "currency", o.order_date as "createdTime", o.total_items as "itemCount" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat o WHERE 1=1 AND o.seller_id = #{supplierId} AND (o.order_number ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR o.order_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT o.payment_method as "taxType", 0 as "taxRate", COALESCE(SUM(o.tax_amount), 0) as "totalTaxAmount", COUNT(*) as "lineCount" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat o WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'PAYMENT_FAILED') AND o.order_date >= CAST(#{startDate} AS TIMESTAMP) AND o.order_date <= CAST(#{endDate} AS TIMESTAMP) GROUP BY o.payment_method ORDER BY "totalTaxAmount" DESC
SELECT customer_status as "state", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.customer_360_flat GROUP BY customer_status ORDER BY "count" DESC

SELECT COALESCE(cpd.category_name, 'Uncategorized') as "categoryName", cpd.category_id as "categoryId", COALESCE(SUM(cpd.total_orders), 0) as "orderCount", COALESCE(SUM(cpd.total_units_sold), 0) as "unitsSold", COALESCE(SUM(cpd.gmv), 0) as "totalRevenue" FROM hm_query.category_performance_daily cpd WHERE cpd.tenant = 'homebase' GROUP BY cpd.category_id, cpd.category_name ORDER BY "totalRevenue" DESC
